text:
Very good service and quality.
Professional and friendly staff.

translations.en:
Very good service and quality.
Professional and friendly staff.
translations.sr:
Veoma dobra usluga i kvalitet.
Profesionalno i ljubazno osoblje.
translations.sr_cyrl:
Веома добра услуга и квалитет.
Професионално и љубазно особље.
translations.ru:
Очень хорошее обслуживание и качество.
Профессиональный и дружелюбный персонал.
translations.de:
Sehr guter Service und Qualität.
Professionelles und freundliches Personal.
translations.tr:
Çok iyi hizmet ve kalite.
Profesyonel ve güler yüzlü personel.
